name: Anthropic
description: Anthropic's Claude API provides access to advanced AI language models for text generation, analysis, and conversation. It supports multi-turn chat, vision, tool use, extended thinking, token counting, message batching, and model listing through a messages-based interface.

capabilities.name: message_create
capabilities.description: Send a structured conversation to Claude and receive an AI-generated response. Supports text, images, documents, tool use, extended thinking, and system prompts.

capabilities.name: message_create_stream
capabilities.description: Send a conversation to Claude and receive the response as a stream of server-sent events for real-time display.

capabilities.name: message_count_tokens
capabilities.description: Count the number of tokens in a message payload before sending it, useful for managing context window limits and estimating costs.

capabilities.name: message_batch_create
capabilities.description: Create a batch of message requests for asynchronous processing at 50% reduced cost.

capabilities.name: message_batches_list
capabilities.description: List all message batches in your organization with their processing status.

capabilities.name: message_batch_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the status and details of a specific message batch.

capabilities.name: models_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve the list of available Claude models including their IDs, display names, and context window sizes.

capabilities.name: model_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific Claude model by its ID.
